invalid_token.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic cannot authenticate with Discord until the bot credentials are restored; we are refreshing them now.
invalid_token.safeNextStep: Rotate or restore the bot token, redeploy, then run /health in a staging guild.

missing_bot_permission.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic is blocked from sending diagnostic replies because it lacks required Discord permissions.
missing_bot_permission.safeNextStep: Grant the missing permission bits to the bot role (and redeploy overrides) before issuing commands.

missing_env_var.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic is missing configuration values, so we need to restore those secrets before it can respond reliably.
missing_env_var.safeNextStep: Add the missing variables with valid values and redeploy the worker.

wrong_interaction_url.customerSafeExplanation: Discord cannot find the address for BotMedic, so commands are dropped before they reach us.
wrong_interaction_url.safeNextStep: Update the interaction URL to the correct worker and run /health to verify responses.

wrong_public_key.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic is reachable, but Discord rejects the signed payloads because the public key is misconfigured.
wrong_public_key.safeNextStep: Paste the correct public key into secrets and re-run /health to confirm verification succeeds.

dependency_runtime_mismatch.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic encountered a runtime incompatibility; we are adjusting the build so it can run in Cloudflare Workers.
dependency_runtime_mismatch.safeNextStep: Adjust the transpiler or dependency versions so they produce supported runtime constructs, then redeploy.

stale_deployment.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic is temporarily offline because the current deployment isn't wired up; we are promoting the latest build.
stale_deployment.safeNextStep: Re-deploy or re-enable the worker route, then test /health within the same guild.

webhook_endpoint_error.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic cannot process interactions right now because the worker code is crashing; we are addressing the issue.
webhook_endpoint_error.safeNextStep: Fix the startup exception (missing dependency or config) and redeploy; then test /health.

role_channel_permission_denial.customerSafeExplanation: BotMedic needs an extra permission tweak because channel-level restrictions are preventing replies.
role_channel_permission_denial.safeNextStep: Adjust channel overrides or role hierarchies so BotMedic can reply in the affected channels.

slow_handler_deferred.customerSafeExplanation: We have a slow diagnostic path, so we are deferring the response until the work completes to keep Discord happy.
slow_handler_deferred.safeNextStep: Run `/incident slow_handler_deferred` to prove the deferred-response path works, then send a follow-up message.
